2171660.name: Tuda:Kuda
2171660.description:
Welcome to the post-apocalyptic story Tuda:Kuda, created by one person – Vladimir “Vladi” Kuzmin.

Fight the infected, explore the locations, collect everything you need for the plane and escape from this dying place.

  • A 5-round revolver and sleight of hand are the only things you can rely on
  • Infected people can be behind every door - be careful
  • Patch up the old plane to move to a better place
  • Monitor your condition with a heart rate monitor
  • Atmospheric locations with their own stories
  • Classic pixel graphics drawn by hand
2171660.supported_languages: 英语, 俄语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 简体中文, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 土耳其语, 日语
